grant_title: New Jersey’s Afterschool and Out-of-School Time (OST) Professional Network
demographic_requirements: Staff and leaders involved in youth programs, particularly those serving ages 12–18
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofits, schools, community organizations, and youth-serving agencies in New Jersey focused on afterschool and out-of-school time programs. Priority may be given to programs addressing youth mental health, inclusion, and professional development.
